'''Harvey Albert Jason''' is an English actor who provided the voice for the [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PT]] driver and [[2-1C medical droid|2-1C]] [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] in ''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''. He also voiced the Imperial transport ship [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and [[Naboo Royal Lifter|Royal Lifter]] pilot in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.
